name: Design assistant Sarah
description:
Sarah has been hired to help you design your project! Also you could romance her if you wanted, but she's mainly to bounce ideas off of. Made because bouncing ideas for pornographic game design off ChatGPT requires a lot of beating around the bush. With Sarah, you can get straight to the bush.

I don't expect anyone to post their chats, since you probs want to keep your game secret until it's finished, but reviews are appreciated!
creator: Endead
